Note: if the documents are not closed bu: Note: If documents aren’t closed but appear here, it’s because the applications have already been submitted. These documents can be safely closed later.
cv-instructions: Please complete our template and upload it here so we can collect all information needed for CV editing.
cv-reminder-1: If you prefer to upload your own English CV instead of our template, please ensure the points above are fully covered.
cv-reminder-2: If you use Canva to create your CV, please share editing access so we can make changes. Based on experience, self-provided CVs often miss information. Cross-check our template with your CV to avoid delays.
cv-requirements-1: 1. Don’t omit important information. Your CV should cover every period since high school, including job searches, exam preparation, retakes, etc., with explanations where needed.
cv-requirements-1.1: Avoid gaps longer than three months in your CV.
cv-requirements-2: 2. Don’t upload only a PDF; please also provide a Word file so we can edit it.
rl-requirements-1: 1. The referee’s email should be their institutional address. Gmail, Hotmail, etc., are not acceptable.
missingDocumentsWarning: Please assign the following missing document for this application:
extraDocumentsWarning: The following document is not required for this application:

general.missing: You need {{required}} general recommendation letter task(s), but only {{provided}} are created. Please create {{difference}} more task(s).
general.extra: You only need {{required}} general recommendation letter task(s), but {{provided}} are created. You can remove {{difference}} task(s).

program.missing: This application needs {{required}} program-specific letter task(s), but only {{provided}} are created. Please create {{difference}} more task(s).
program.extra: This application needs {{required}} program-specific letter task(s), but {{provided}} are created. You can remove {{difference}} task(s).

generalRLTable.title: Recommendation Letter Requirements
generalRLTable.subtitle: Decided applications appear first and highlight in green, while pending entries remain gray for quick scanning.

cvProfile.title: CV profile
cvProfile.subtitle: Reusable details used by the CV draft and other documents. Editable here and in the student survey tab — it is the same data.

additionalInfo.title: Additional information
additionalInfo.subtitle: Anything you want highlighted on this CV that is not in your profile — e.g. what to emphasise, context for a gap, special achievements. The editor and the AI draft will use this.
additionalInfo.placeholder: e.g. Please emphasise my machine-learning projects and the startup internship. I took a gap in 2021 to care for family.

aiDraft.title: AI first draft (beta)
aiDraft.subtitle: Generates a first-draft CV from the student profile and the CV details. You can generate even when data is incomplete — missing items are listed in the checklist rather than invented. You can then create or download a .docx draft.
aiDraft.notesLabel: Add or correct facts the profile is missing (optional)
aiDraft.notesPlaceholder: e.g. GPA 3.8/4.30; Internship at Acme, 06/2022–08/2022, built CI pipeline; German B2
aiDraft.noIssues: No issues found. The draft looks complete.
aiDraft.docxFailed: Could not create the document. Please try again.
aiDraft.confirmErrors: There are must-fix items in the checklist. Create the .docx anyway?
